
# List of LLMs and AI services used by Blawby
# See https://ai.google.dev/guides/llms_txt for format and details

# Example entry:
# provider: OpenAI
# model: gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo
# usage: AI chat, intake automation, content generation

provider: OpenAI
model: gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo
usage: AI chat, intake automation, content generation

provider: Anthropic
model: claude-3-opus, claude-3-sonnet
usage: AI chat, legal research, summarization
